DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00);REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND.GIVEN ADDRESS IS VACANT AND BOARDED UP. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAZEMIAN, REZA AS TO DEFENDANT AVI CORPORATION DBA NATALIE'S ANTIQUES

RETURN MAIL RE: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL ON ENTIRE ACTION L.R. 18.0 ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD AS TO DEFENDANT AVI CORPORATION DBA NATALIE'S ANTIQUES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,665.00 FILED BY KAZEMIAN, REZA AS TO DEFENDANT AVI CORPORATION DBA NATALIE'S ANTIQUES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AVI SADI--PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
